easy.title: Count File Lines

medium.title: Search Keyword in File
medium.description: Return list of line numbers containing `keyword`.

hard.title: Parse Key-Value Config File
hard.description: Parse file lines `key=value` into dict (ignoring comments starting with `#`).

debugging.title: Fix Missing Close Bug
debugging.description: Refactor raw open() to use context manager.
debugging.fixedCode:
with open('log.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = f.read()
bugs: Missing close call causes resource leak. Wrap in `with open()`.
